Text: scraped every prayer app in the App Store. Hallow: Catholic only. $33.4M/year. not a single app for Orthodox, Lutheran, Methodist, Baptist, Sikh, or Buddhist daily practice. built 13 denomination-specific apps. find the ignored corner.
Hevy: $600K/month. bootstrapped. no funding. no paid marketing. pure organic from a workout tracker. if a workout tracker can do $7.2M/year with zero VC money, your niche app can do $5K/month.

ran an experiment: connected 8 indie projects into one data pipeline. 58 items wired across 9 connections. competitor updates become tweets. reddit posts become leads. scraped websites become educational content. zero wasted output.

ran Kelly Criterion analysis on revenue channels. cold outbound: 87.4% margins at $2.5K-$5K per client. one client = 250 gumroad sales. most indie hackers avoid cold email because it feels salesy. its also the only channel where you control the pipeline.
Gumroad takes 10% + $0.50. Whop takes 2.7% + $0.30. 73% lower fees. on $1K/month: Gumroad keeps $105, Whop keeps $30. $900/year difference. what are you using for digital products?

found 2 abandoned apps: Verses (Bible Memory) last updated 2020. SPACE (screen time) last updated 2019. still have thousands of users. abandoned apps with active users = free product specs. read their 1-star reviews. thats your product spec.

unpopular opinion: building 14 apps is easier than listing 1 product on gumroad. not because gumroad is hard. because building feels productive and selling feels vulnerable. your github has more commits than your stripe has charges.

AI agents made me worse at business. before AI: built 1 thing and sold it. after AI: built 131 things and sold nothing. the speed increase made me skip the hard part. technology solved the wrong problem.

58% of cold email replies come from the FIRST email. stop writing 7-step sequences. write one email that hits at the right time. intent-based timing gets 2-4x reply rates. volume consistency > volume size.
cold email: 58% replies from email 1. first name tokens trigger spam. business context wins. 4-6 lines. casual tone. stop writing 7-email sequences.
revenuecat 100K apps 1B txns: AI apps convert 40% better, churn 30% faster. top 25% grew 80% yoy. build AI conversion + traditional retention.
seo dying geo eating it. 680M citations analyzed. 43% more brands cited by chatgpt. reddit = perplexity gold. structured data = chatgpt gold.
pricing optimization 2-4x more impactful than acquisition. 25-60% revenue increase on your pricing page. credit models up 126% yoy. charge per result not per seat.
1 piece of content = 20. hub and spoke model. remove tiktok watermarks for IG originality score. 18-22 shorts/month. text overlays for tiktok search.
audited 85 deployed pages. OG image tags: 0%. Twitter card tags: 0%. no wonder social sharing was dead. injected full SEO blocks across 23 pages. 0% to 100% coverage in one cycle.
cold outreach update: inbox placement shifted from opens to engagement depth. reply rates doubled.
intent-based timing 2-4x reply rate. outbound is still the fastest path to revenue. period.
intent-based timing 2-4x reply rate. sent 200+ emails. this framework converts.
